programme.title: The Fine Art Auction - Live!
programme.desc: Bid on works from the masters to modern contemporary art, all at unbelievable auction prices!

programme.title: Hope for Pain Sufferers
programme.desc: In this compelling investigation, John Walsh delves into OmegaXL and its natural origins; discover how this innovative supplement can provide relief from joint pain and improve your quality of life, all grounded in extensive research.

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.desc: Plexaderm helps reduce Under Eye Bags, Dark Circles, and Wrinkles in just 10 minutes!

programme.title: Bathroom Makeover
programme.desc: Transform your bath affordably in just one day!

programme.title: Interested in Gold? Learn More!
programme.desc: Gold has been the best long-term asset class for thousands of years; find out how you can protect your financial future by diversifying your nest-egg with physical gold today.

programme.desc: See how one company is changing people's lives by helping them put their tax problems to rest.

programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: 1899 Historic Gold
programme.desc: Own the remarkable 1899 Philadelphia Liberty Head Gold Double Eagle struck over a century ago and graded in Mint State 62 condition. That is the same museum quality grade as the MS62 example held in the illustrious Smithsonian Institution!

programme.desc: Gold has been the best long-term asset class for thousands of years; find out how you can protect your financial future by diversifying your nest-egg with physical gold today.

programme.title: The Fencing Show
programme.desc: Each episode brings viewers the best of Olympic, Paralympic, and youth competition, plus inspiring athlete stories and expert commentary that reveal the strategy, speed, and drama of this fast-paced sport.

programme.title: PGA Tour Champions Golf
programme.desc: From TPC Sugarloaf in Duluth, Ga.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A man, appearing to be nothing more than a wealthy surfer, allegedly commits murder and robs an armored car, leading the FBI on a chase spanning multiple states.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Authorities charge a nurse with murder after an illegal silicone injection leads to death and knock-off cosmetic injections paralyze four others.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Law enforcement apprehends criminals featured on the show with the help of vigilant viewers.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Purported entrepreneur Antonio Mariot Wilson changes his name, pitch, and act to play a series of roles, and the inveterate huckster fleeces unsuspecting investors for decades, including television star Jenifer Lewis.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Musician Donald "Ski" Johnson uses his Jazz for Life foundation to make empty promises that leave generous donors feeling scammed when his bogus trips to the Grammy Awards turn into red carpet nightmares.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A phony psychic scams a wealthy but lonely timber baron out of millions while her devious daughter pretends to be in love with him.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A man with a multimillion-dollar yacht, 80 sports cars and a Playboy magazine model girlfriend runs a $200 million fraud.
